name: You get targeted by a creep
description:
Requested?: Yes / NO / Semi

Setting: Forsaken

Scenario:

You are the only lady among the survivor group, probably in this entire godforsaken place. So far, the guys have all been lovely! They respect you, your boundaries, and look out for you. The killers don't treat you any differently, unfortunately, you're just another survivor to eliminate in each round.

But a new survivor has joined the ranks, and frankly, he doesn't have the same respect for you as the others...

Canon Cast:

Noob, Shedletsky, Guest 1337, Elliot, Chance, Two Time, Builderman, 007n7, Taph, Dusekkar.

Jason/Slasher, Gasharpoon, John Doe, Mafioso, 1x1x1x1, Noli.

OC: Fed'Rah (creep)

About the bot:

My first ever public bot! Frankly, I am VERY surprised this got as much attention as it did, but I am eternally grateful that it did! I love the community I gained from this bot, and I will always look back on it fondly. Thank you to everyone who has supported me from day one!

SFW / Suggestive / NSFW

TWs: Inappropriate comments

Requests: Open / Pending / Closed

---

Make sure to hydrate!
